atomicity.message: Staged payload adds SECURITY.md private vulnerability reporting deferral wording and stages only the matching project-readiness-kit-osl-preflip-gate-557 Beads acceptance record; no unrelated tracker records, README/docs launch, or GitHub visibility/settings change are staged.

conditions.message: ScarletMarsh verified the rev3 staged payload is mechanically clean.
evidence: git diff --cached --name-status showed exactly M .beads/issues.jsonl and A SECURITY.md.

go run ./cmd/burpvalve hash --staged --json returned staged_payload_hash sha256:9ef1b661470a7bd9c0b8dbf52a9c7c8975b23b6f5747b680eb6b0de3659952b0 with included paths .beads/issues.jsonl and SECURITY.md only, no hash-excluded staged payload.
git diff --cached --check exited 0 with no output.

conditions.message: BrightOwl verified the policy and preflip gate contain a single concise deferral surface.
evidence: git show :SECURITY.md inspection: the staged policy is a concise single source for reporting, supported versions, and disclosure.

br show project-readiness-kit-osl-preflip-gate-557 --json | jq -r .[0].description | rg: the preflip gate has one explicit Security reporting deferral acceptance block carrying the future PVR verification requirement.
git diff --cached --check: exit 0, no whitespace/error output.

conditions.message: BrightOwl verified the staged text does not pretend PVR is active before launch.
evidence: git show :SECURITY.md: names GitHub Private Vulnerability Reporting for clicksopendoors/burpvalve, but explicitly says activation and working-channel verification are deferred to the visibility-flip gate rather than claiming success now.
gh api repos/clicksopendoors/burpvalve/private-vulnerability-reporting --silent --include: HTTP 404 observed; staged preflip gate text treats that as pre-launch deferral only, not launch acceptance.

br show project-readiness-kit-osl-preflip-gate-557 --json: preflip acceptance says not to close the gate until the working private reporting channel has direct evidence recorded or the owner records a concrete replacement channel.

conditions.message: The staged payload is documentation/tracker text only and adds no function, command, parser, schema, or executable code path needing paired tests.
evidence: git diff --cached --name-status listed only .beads/issues.jsonl and SECURITY.md.

conditions.message: BrightOwl verified the owner-approved deferral satisfies the security-reporting bead content and preflip acceptance requirements.
evidence: git show :SECURITY.md: SECURITY.md exists, points to https://github.com/clicksopendoors/burpvalve/security, warns not to open public exploit issues, defers PVR activation/working-channel verification to the visibility-flip gate, and avoids fixed SLA promises.

br show project-readiness-kit-osl-preflip-gate-557 --json: acceptance now requires direct evidence before visibility flip that GitHub PVR is active/reachable or an owner-recorded concrete replacement channel, and forbids personal email fallback text unless owner-approved.
gh repo view clicksopendoors/burpvalve --json nameWithOwner,url,visibility: observed repo home is clicksopendoors/burpvalve and visibility is PRIVATE, matching the no-launch/private-prep state.

conditions.message: ScarletMarsh verified the rev3 packet and independent hash reproduction are bound to the corrected staged index.
evidence: Packet 3258 provides feature id, staged hash, manifest hash, response path, atomicity statement, staged path list, assigned cells, and rev3 scope correction summary.
I independently reproduced the rev3 staged hash/path binding with go run ./cmd/burpvalve hash --staged --json.
git status --short shows .beads/issues.jsonl has both staged and unstaged tracker state, but the staged hash/path verdict is bound to the index only.

conditions.message: BrightOwl verified the rev2 scope blocker is resolved.
evidence: go run ./cmd/burpvalve hash --staged --json: staged_payload_hash matches sha256:9ef1b661470a7bd9c0b8dbf52a9c7c8975b23b6f5747b680eb6b0de3659952b0 and included_paths are exactly .beads/issues.jsonl and SECURITY.md.
git diff --cached --name-status: staged files are only M .beads/issues.jsonl and A SECURITY.md; unrelated worktree dirt is unstaged.
git diff --cached -- .beads/issues.jsonl changed JSONL records are limited to project-readiness-kit-osl-preflip-gate-557.
git diff --cached --name-only | rg -v ^(\.beads/issues\.jsonl|SECURITY\.md)$: no extra staged paths.

conditions.message: ScarletMarsh verified no destructive operation surface is staged.
evidence: Staged SECURITY.md is static Markdown reporting policy text.
Staged .beads/issues.jsonl is tracker JSONL text; no scripts, delete operations, migrations, release commands, repo visibility changes, generated evidence writes, or settings mutation are staged.

conditions.message: ScarletMarsh verified the rev2 tracker-scope/data-integrity failure is fixed and the staged security claims match the ruling.
evidence: The rev2 scope failure is fixed: git diff --cached -- .beads/issues.jsonl changed JSONL records now show only minus/plus records for project-readiness-kit-osl-preflip-gate-557.
git diff --cached --stat reports .beads/issues.jsonl changed by 2 lines (1 replacement) and SECURITY.md added with 27 lines, matching the scoped rev3 packet.

SECURITY.md names GitHub Private Vulnerability Reporting for clicksopendoors/burpvalve, links https://github.com/clicksopendoors/burpvalve/security, says not to open public exploit issues, defers PVR activation/working-channel verification to the visibility-flip gate, and avoids personal email fallback and fixed SLA promises.

The staged preflip gate record includes Security reporting deferral acceptance: verify GitHub PVR before visibility flip, treat current private-repo HTTP 404 as pre-launch deferral only, do not close the preflip gate without direct evidence or owner-recorded replacement channel, and do not publish personal security email fallback text unless owner-approved.
gh repo view clicksopendoors/burpvalve --json nameWithOwner,url,visibility returned clicksopendoors/burpvalve, https://github.com/clicksopendoors/burpvalve, PRIVATE.

conditions.message: BrightOwl verified the staged policy avoids public exploit disclosure, personal email fallback, secrets, and unsupported SLA commitments.
evidence: git show :SECURITY.md: explicitly says not to open a public issue with exploit details.
git show :SECURITY.md | rg -n @|mailto:|email|personal|fallback: no personal email/fallback address is published in the staged policy.
git show :SECURITY.md: says the project does not promise a fixed response timeline, avoiding unsupported SLA commitments.
br show project-readiness-kit-osl-preflip-gate-557 --json: preflip gate forbids personal security email fallback text unless the owner explicitly supplies and approves that channel.

conditions.message: No UI pixels, terminal rendering, CSS, images/SVGs, screenshots, browser surface, or visual component changes are staged.
evidence: git diff --cached --name-status listed only .beads/issues.jsonl and SECURITY.md.

conditions.message: Static Markdown plus tracker JSONL only; no runtime code, hot path, I/O loop, command behavior, or performance-budget surface is staged.
evidence: git diff --cached --stat reported .beads/issues.jsonl and SECURITY.md text changes only.

conditions.message: BrightOwl verified this payload preserves the owner-controlled launch authorization boundary.
evidence: git diff --cached --name-status: staged files are SECURITY.md and .beads/issues.jsonl only; no GitHub setting, visibility flip, README launch surface, or code behavior change is staged.
gh repo view clicksopendoors/burpvalve --json nameWithOwner,url,visibility: repo remains PRIVATE during this verification.
git show :SECURITY.md and preflip gate inspection: working-channel verification is explicitly deferred to the owner-controlled visibility-flip gate, preserving the launch authorization boundary.
